name: Bernie Ward Community Center
description: Bernie Ward Community Center is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Augusta, GA. There are 2 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A one-time fee is required to play. Amenities include restrooms, water, and wheelchair accessibility.

name: Diamond Lakes Community Center
description: Diamond Lakes Community Center is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Hephzibah, GA. There are 2 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Players have access to restrooms, water, and wheelchair accessibility. A one-time fee is required to play.

name: Dink'd Indoor Pickleball
description: Dink'd Indoor Pickleball is a place to play pickleball in Augusta, GA. There are 9 indoor acrylic and concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The facility includes amenities like food, restrooms, water, youth programming, lights, a pro shop or equipment store, trainers or lessons, wheelchair accessibility, and adaptive programming. The courts are free. Reservations are available.

name: Dink'd Pickleball
description: Beautiful location and facilities - all new! Great for players at any level.
open_play_schedule:
PLAY ON YOUR TERMS
OUR COURTS ARE OPEN TO ANYONE WHO WANTS TO PLAY!
All you need is a reservation – no membership required! With flexible options to suit your schedule, our facility welcomes players of all skill levels, from beginners to seasoned pros.

name: Forest Hills Racquet Club
description: Forest Hills Racquet Club is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Augusta, GA. There are 4 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are private. The facility includes amenities like restrooms, water, and lights.

name: Kroc Center
description: Kroc Center is a place to play pickleball in Augusta, GA. There are 3 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. You can reserve the courts. A one-time fee is required to play.

name: Montclair Pickleball
description: Montclair is a private venue in an HOA community.  For questions about joining or guest visits, text or email Anne Rheins.   706-399-4958. arheins@gmail.com
open_play_schedule: Private Courts. Membership is full at this time. Contact Anne Rheins to get on wait list to join or to arrange a guest visit.
fees: Private — Annual Membership Fees: Resident: $40 Non-Resident: $150

name: Torch Fitness Center (Ike’s Pickleball & MRW Sports)
description: Come play pickleball at Torch Fitness Center (Ike’s Pickleball & MRW Sports) in Augusta, GA! There are 9 wood, hard, and asphalt courts. 3 are outdoors and 6 are indoors. Tape lines have been laid, and portable nets are available. The facility includes amenities like lights, trainers or lessons, locker rooms, restrooms, food, water, and wheelchair accessibility. You can’t reserve the courts. The courts are free.
open_play_schedule: Reserve your spot today on Pickleheads and purchase your punch card when you show up!

name: Tutt Middle School
description: Tutt Middle is in the process of creating an area where students can learn how to play & practice the game of pickleball. The information will be updated as the area is complete.

name: West Lake Country Club
description: West Lake Country Club is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Augusta, GA. There are 4 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. A membership is required to play. Amenities include restrooms, water, and lights.

name: Willis Foreman School
description: Willis Foreman School is a place to play pickleball in Hephzibah, GA. There are 2 outdoor courts. You’ll have to create your own lines and bring your own net. The courts are free.

name: Wilson Family YMCA
description: Wilson Family YMCA is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Augusta, GA. There are 4 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play. Reservations are available. Amenities include restrooms, water, lights, locker rooms, and wheelchair accessibility.
open_play_schedule: Saturday nights (After Hours) requires pre-registration here: https://thefamilyy.org/programs/22511492/pickleball/#division_2171926
fees: Members only — Programs available to non-members: After Hours (Sat nights) and Ladder League.  Advance registration required here: https://thefamilyy.org/programs/22511492/pickleball/?locations=11

name: Windsor Spring Baptist Church
description: Windsor Spring Baptist Church is a place to play pickleball in Hephzibah, GA. There are 2 indoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are free. Amenities include restrooms and water.

description: WT Johnson Community Center is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Augusta, GA. There are 2 indoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available.
